author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Micchaditthis - Wrong Views
content:
Miccha Ditthis

CONTENTS


Page:
I Introduction - Classic and modern miccha ditthis
2Miccha dasana, place in kusala dharmas
a Tolerance and Criticism
3"Criticism is negative"
3What is negative and positive
4"religions cannot be criticized"
4"I cannot make mistakes or be on the wrong path"
5Feeling and Judgement; Fact and Value
6 ... in Art
7"The private life is sacrosanct"
10"Letting it all hang out; Self expression is of paramount value"
11"Progress and Change is always for the better"
12Spiritual hierarchy - "Everybody's equal, equally equal"
13Evaluation and criticism, knowing one's own feelings.
16"Don't do what I do, do what I say"
16Humbug
18Attitude rather than philosophy
18Refusal to accept failure
20Goal setting and objective/subjective criteria of success
21Readiness for ordination
22Generality and Principle
23"You're more of an individual if you don't join a group"
24Roles and Feminism
26 and individuality
26Openness
27"Towing the party line"
28Power and Spiritual Community
29Buddhism and the "have-nots"
Humbug
